roa.docketEntryComment: CONFIDENTIAL Petition for Revocation of Parole PC 3000.08, PC 1203.2

/CAL:PAROLE PHC, POSSIBLE DISPO,STATUS/X:BEVERLY L GONZALES, CLERK/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/3000ADV/3000ADM/X:PAROLEE ADMITS VIOLATION #1,/3000REIN/PAJ:114 DAYS/CCC1:21011345 AND 22000652/X:PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 30 DAYS, NO TIME LOST,/4019HALF/X:THE COUNTY JAIL TIME OF 60 DAYS IMPOSED IN 21011394 ON 12-14-21 IS NOW PERMANENTLY STAYED PURSUANT TO A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION,/X:PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TO PAROLE UPONRELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONSGIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/X:THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE REMAINING VIOLATIONS IS GRANTED,/

CONTD DA PTR HEARING-(PAROLE)/CAL:DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC 3000,08/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:HARRIS TABACK/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD:PAROLE IS ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/CONTD:PAROLE PHC/X:MRTABACK WILL APPEAR VIA ZOOM AT 1000 AM,/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC, POSSIBLE DISPO, STATUS/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/CONT/
/CAL:PAROLE PHC/DAWT/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/CONTD:PAROLE PHC, POSSIBLE DISPO, STATUS/
